metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the POS event was ingested into the workspace.

columns.name: TerminalID
columns.description: Unique identifier of the POS terminal that generated the event.

columns.name: StoreID
columns.description: Retail store identifier.

columns.name: EmployeeID
columns.description: Operator or cashier identifier performing the transaction.

columns.name: OperatorID
columns.description: Supervisor or override operator identifier (used for void/refund authorisation).

columns.name: TransactionType
columns.description: Type of POS transaction: Sale, Void, Refund, GiftCardIssue, GiftCardReload, GiftCardRedeem, NoSale.

columns.name: TransactionAmount
columns.description: Transaction value in GBP.

columns.name: TransactionCount
columns.description: Number of transactions within the aggregation window.

columns.name: PaymentMethod
columns.description: Payment method: Cash, Card, GiftCard, ContactlessMobile.

columns.name: CardLast4
columns.description: Last 4 digits of payment card (if applicable, for correlation only).

columns.name: GiftCardID
columns.description: Gift card identifier (for gift card transaction types).

columns.name: TotalGiftCardValue
columns.description: Aggregated value of gift card transactions within the detection window.

columns.name: VoidCount
columns.description: Number of void transactions by the operator in the lookback window.

columns.name: RefundCount
columns.description: Number of refund transactions by the operator in the lookback window.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: RetailShield event classification: pos_void_refund, gift_card_fraud, pos_no_sale.

columns.name: RiskScore
columns.description: RetailShield risk score 0-100; higher values indicate greater anomaly confidence.

columns.name: SignalName
columns.description: RetailShield detection signal that triggered this record.

columns.name: PlaybookTrigger
columns.description: Recommended playbook to invoke: notify_soc, suspend_terminal, block_ip.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: Source system tag — always 'RetailShield-POS' for this table.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp when the log event was ingested into the workspace.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: RetailShield event classification: voice_fraud, pos_anomaly, network_anomaly.

columns.name: DeviceName
columns.description: Hostname of the device generating the log event.

columns.name: TerminalID
columns.description: POS terminal identifier (for POS-related log events).

columns.name: StoreID
columns.description: Retail store identifier.

columns.name: CallerID
columns.description: Caller identifier or phone number (for voice fraud events).

columns.name: CallCount
columns.description: Number of calls from the CallerID within the detection window.

columns.name: CallDurationSeconds
columns.description: Total or average call duration in seconds.

columns.name: VoiceAnomalyScore
columns.description: AI-derived anomaly score for voice pattern analysis (0.0–1.0).

columns.name: ProcessName
columns.description: Process name involved in POS anomaly events.

columns.name: ProcessCommandLine
columns.description: Process command line for POS anomaly events.

columns.name: NetworkDestination
columns.description: Destination IP or hostname for network anomaly events.

columns.name: BytesSent
columns.description: Bytes sent to network destination.

columns.name: RiskScore
columns.description: RetailShield risk score 0-100.

columns.name: SignalName
columns.description: RetailShield detection signal that triggered this record.

columns.name: PlaybookTrigger
columns.description: Recommended playbook to invoke.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: Source system tag — always 'RetailShield-Logs' for this table.
